name: Outsourcing Contract Checklist
description: Checklist for outsourcing agreements with third-party service providers

questions.question: Does the contract clearly define the outsourced functions and responsibilities?
Are key performance indicators (KPIs) established for measuring service quality?
Does the contract include governance and oversight mechanisms?
Are transition and knowledge transfer arrangements defined?
Does the contract address staff qualifications and training requirements?
Are business continuity and disaster recovery requirements specified?
Does the contract include audit rights and access to records?
Are data protection and privacy requirements addressed?
Does the contract define the process for approving subcontractors?
Are exit management and reversibility procedures defined?
Does the contract specify insurance requirements?
